scope: PR-08 code lane: the Skills panel is made viewport-relative so it fits cleanly at 640x360 and 1280x720 and stays usable as the tree grows. No new perks/lanes/mechanics/art/PNGs; no gameplay/save change.
summary: The Skills panel used to be a fixed size (540x420) with a small fixed graph area (500x180): cramped on a big screen and unable to grow. It now sizes itself to a fraction of the viewport, clamped to sane bounds and never spilling past the edges, and re-centres whenever the window resizes. The constellation graph and the inspector now stretch to fill, so the star-map gets the extra room and the ScrollContainer keeps panning as more lanes and nodes are added. Because the game scales a same-aspect window, the panel that is roomy at 1280x720 simply renders scaled-to-fit at 640x360. None of the skill mechanics changed -- the perk data, node layout, star-map treatment, purchase flow, save ownership, and inspector text are all exactly as before.
acceptance: Fits with a margin at 640x360 (576x324) and 1280x720 (1100x648) (pr08_skill_panel_viewport_relative)
Roomier than the old fixed 540x420 and grows with the viewport; the live panel adopts the computed size
Star-map, purchase flow, persistence, and inspector unchanged (fq06_panel_opens_and_inspects + fq09s_constellation_links_match_prereqs stay green)
Waited-GUI smoke 345/345; validator + capsule_doctor public_repo + wiki links green; HUD-QA shots at both sizes reviewed
validation: scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS (skill panel is viewport-relative; forbids the old 540x420 / 500x180)
waited-GUI Godot 4.6.1 smoke -> PASS 345/345 (fresh results file, from a clean shell profile)
decisions: Size the panel as a clamped fraction of the logical viewport and re-centre on size_changed, rather than a fixed rect
Let the graph ScrollContainer and inspector EXPAND_FILL so the star-map takes the room; keep NODE_SIZE/SPACING unchanged so the layout is byte-identical and the ScrollContainer handles growth
Extract panel_size_for as a pure function so the smoke can pin the fit at 640x360 and 1280x720 deterministically
VARIABLE_MATRIX.html hand-synced for the two changed rows only; broad wiki regen drift stays out of scope
risks: fq09u1_live_clip_switch cold-profile flakiness persists in the music lane (passes on rerun)
fq19_map_events_coexist is sensitive to a contaminated persisted shell.json (a corrupt HUD layout reset_hud_layout cannot fully neutralise); it passes from a clean shell profile -- unrelated to PR-08
docs/VARIABLE_MATRIX.html and the wider wiki HTML remain behind their markdown except the hand-synced rows, until a dedicated wiki-regen pass
next_action: Code lane complete (PR-00..PR-08); PR-09 deferred, PR-10 art lane. Next is an operator-chosen arc/queue item.
